title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is a local-first AI workspace that enables users to self-host and run local models like Gemma, access AI agents with web search and shell capabilities, perform deep research with visual report generation, and compare models blindly. It integrates with external providers like OpenRouter and NVIDIA NIM and includes workspace features such as memory, notes, documents, calendar, and mail management.
